notes: Official OpenAI transport for the locked AdsMind agent-side benchmark.
Model is pinned to the GPT-5.4 snapshot gpt-5.4-2026-03-05 for reproducibility.
This config preserves the same physics protocol as the Gemini and Grok-4 runs: MACE small on CPU with float32 precision and no dispersion.
API key is read from the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.
OCD62 overlap12 RUN3 reproducibility rerun: 12 overlap cases, all five ablation variants, no base-matrix rerun.
